title: Before/after contact sheet from git history
oneline: --source git:<ref> and --compare git:<ref> validated on farm and owl-tall, offline
summary: Implemented --source git:<ref> (all layers read from the commit's blobs via git cat-file, nothing checked out) and --compare git:<ref> (old pair rendered above the current shipped/samples pair with provenance tag chips) in gen-contact-sheet.mjs. Validated end-to-end against real refs: farm vs 46bc770 (all 12 pre-fork night fills differ) and creatures/owl-tall vs 6e3f14f and pre-rename 34a606f via a legacy-filename fallback. Interning identical images by index keeps the farm compare sheet at 6.86 MB vs 5.72 MB plain (naive doubling would be ~11.4 MB), well under the 16 MB Artifact cap, and plain shipped/samples modes were regression-verified untouched.
tried: Reading every layer (outline/chalk/light/night) from a git ref's blobs with git cat-file instead of materializing a temp dir
--compare git:<ref> rendering the ref's light+night pair directly above the current pair, with provenance tag chips
Interning identical data URIs into an indexed image table to keep compare sheets under the 16 MB cap
Legacy-filename fallback for refs older than the 099204f dot-separated rename
Scoring the outline-keep badge from the ref's own fill-src raws
Playwright screenshot verification of every mode plus samples/shipped regression runs
worked: All modes render correctly with zero console errors; bad refs fail cleanly
farm vs 46bc770 shows all 12 pre-fork vs chalk-fork night fills side by side; owl-tall vs 6e3f14f isolates its regenerated night fill
Pre-rename ref 34a606f renders via legacy names and surfaces the historical blown-out-sclera owl
Compare sheet 6.86 MB (vs 5.72 plain) thanks to interning; shipped mode byte-size unchanged
Patch (5 files, +187/-46) re-applies cleanly to a pristine tree; ESLint clean
failed: First cut rendered a false 'no night fill' note: interned index 0 is falsy, so !cell.night misfired — fixed with == null checks
limitations: Fills committed before the inpainted punch (48d38d4) still carry outlines and draw doubled in Combined view — judge those refs on the Color view (documented)
Keep badge on git cells requires fill-src raws to exist at the ref under the modern name
Old/new stack vertically (pair above pair) rather than in one row, doubling scroll length

comparisons.label: farm/horse-tall night
comparisons.note: largest byte delta in the regen (78k to 107k)
